name: Popcorn Haystacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss popped corn, peanuts, and chow mein noodles together in a large bowl.
2. Place chocolate chips in a glass bowl.
3. Microwave the chocolate chips on medium high for 3 minutes.
4. Pour the melted chocolate over the popcorn mixture.
5. Toss until well mixed.
6. Place spoonfuls of the tossed mixture on wax paper.
7. Cool until firm.
8. Store in a tightly covered container.
Makes 24 haystacks.
